channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Samsung TVs are getting a free upgrade that makes casting much easier
item.description: This removes one of the biggest annoyances with Samsung TVs.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Samsung Tv Plus Guide Lifestyle
media:content.media:text: Samsung Tv Plus Guide Lifestyle
media:content.media:title: Samsung Tv Plus Guide Lifestyle

item.title: Workspace accounts in Google Home finally get proper Nest device, home sharing support
item.description: The Google Home app welcomed Workspace account users and added several features, while also listing some restrictions.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The new Google Home device management UI on a Google Pixel Fold
media:content.media:text: The new Google Home device management UI on a Google Pixel Fold
media:content.media:title: The new Google Home device management UI on a Google Pixel Fold

item.title: Each Moto Razr 2026 color might feel a little different, as rumors talk textures
item.description: What might the Moto Razr 2026 feel like this year? This rumor concerns textures and colors for consumers.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Razr Ultra 2025 outside in tent mode
media:content.media:text: The Razr Ultra 2025 outside in tent mode
media:content.media:title: The Razr Ultra 2025 outside in tent mode

item.title: Mint Mobile slashes $500 OFF the Google Pixel 10 in new deal, plus get 50% off your phone bill for a year — I'm serious
item.description: Need a new phone plan? Mint Mobile will give you $500 off the Pixel 10 when you bundle with a year of discounted wireless.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Pixel 10 display outside
media:content.media:text: Pixel 10 display outside
media:content.media:title: Pixel 10 display outside

item.title: The Pixel 11 Pro XL just leaked, and it looks exactly how you'd expect
item.description: The Pixel 11 Pro XL design has leaked, showing a familiar look similar to its predecessor.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Leaked renders of the Google Pixel 11 Pro XL
media:content.media:text: Leaked renders of the Google Pixel 11 Pro XL
media:content.media:title: Leaked renders of the Google Pixel 11 Pro XL

item.title: Google might say no more to Android rollbacks on the Pixel 10 with a patch
item.description: Rollbacks for Android software might vanish from Google's flagship Pixel 10 phones.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central

item.title: Google AI Pro just got a massive storage upgrade for free
item.description: Google boosts AI Pro to 5TB for the same $20/month, making it a solid deal for AI users.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: A Pixel 9a sitting next to an Android figurine showing the Google One AI Pro and AI Ultra plans.
media:content.media:text: A Pixel 9a sitting next to an Android figurine showing the Google One AI Pro and AI Ultra plans.
media:content.media:title: A Pixel 9a sitting next to an Android figurine showing the Google One AI Pro and AI Ultra plans.

item.title: Nothing reportedly interested in AI smart glasses that might be a year away
item.description: A recent rumor alleged Nothing might chase an entry into the AI smart glasses market in the future.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Nothing Phone 4a vs Phone 4a Pro from the launch in London

media:content.media:title: Nothing Phone 4a vs Phone 4a Pro from the launch in London

item.title: Google just announced Wear OS 6.1, and it adds a time zone feature I've wanted for years
item.description: Wear OS 6.1 can now update time zones based on physical location without network access.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Pixel Watch 4 Fitbit Quick Start Tile

media:content.media:title: Pixel Watch 4 Fitbit Quick Start Tile

item.title: Gmail's new AI Inbox is here, but it'll cost you $250 a month
item.description: Gmail's AI Inbox is rolling out to Google AI Ultra users, offering smart email prioritization tools.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: AI Overviews in Gmail
media:content.media:text: AI Overviews in Gmail
media:content.media:title: AI Overviews in Gmail

item.title: AT&T just discounted the Google Pixel 10a to the price of a latte — and for once, the fine print doesn't make my head hurt
item.description: Add a line with ANY unlimited plan and T-Mobile will give you a Google Pixel 10a for only $3.99/month.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.

item.title: I gave my Meta smart glasses a nose and now they last all day long
item.description: The BoboVR CG2 charges all of my Meta smart glasses at home and on the go thanks to its 3-in-1 modular design.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A BoboVR CG2 battery attached to a pair of white Oakley Meta HSTN smart glasses

media:content.media:title: A BoboVR CG2 battery attached to a pair of white Oakley Meta HSTN smart glasses

item.title: Google's authentic Refurbished program grabs Pixel 8a, amid Amazon expansion
item.description: Google's Certified Refurbished program loops in the Pixel 8a and extends its reach to more consumers on Amazon.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Verizon challenges T-Mobile with a deal that gets you a FREE Galaxy S26 Ultra — no trade-in required
item.description: Verizon will give you a FREE Galaxy S26 Ultra when you add a line with the Unlimited Ultimate plan. No kidding!

item.title: AT&T’s new OneConnect bundle is a great deal you probably can’t have

item.title: Google finally fixed Gemini for Home so you can stop yelling at your ceiling

item.title: CMF Headphone Pro is already one of the best values in audio, and it's another 32% OFF

item.title: The Google Pixel 10 Pro Fold finally makes sense at $300 OFF for Amazon's Big Spring Sale

item.description: Sony WH-1000XM5 might be the best value in audio gear at their lowest price ever during Amazon's Big Spring Sale. You can save a whopping 39% for a limited time.

item.title: My favorite noise-cancelling headphones for peaceful long flights are ALREADY $50 OFF during Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.description: Bose's QuietComfort Ultra Gen 2 headphones are my go-to cans for blocking out noise on trips, and they're discounted by $50 for Amazon's Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Fitbit's health coach snags a trio of features, as non-subscribers get in on Public Preview

item.title: Order up: Amazon's Alexa Plus is there for late-night snacks from Grubhub, Uber Eats
item.description: Alexa Plus subscribers can lean on the AI for food orders from Grubhub or Uber Eats without lifting a finger.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Amazon's Alexa Plus lets customers link their Grubhub or Uber Eats accounts and begin ordering food with their voices.

item.title: I've taken hundreds of photos with the Galaxy S26 Ultra. Here's how it compares to its biggest competitors

item.title: Finally! Galaxy Watch 8 Blood Pressure monitoring is here in 'phased' US rollout
item.description: Samsung finally announced that its Blood Pressure monitoring for the Galaxy Watches has cleared major hurdles and is arriving in the U.S.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung's Galaxy Watches are now receiving Blood Pressure monitoring, so users can keep an eye on their heart health.

item.title: Amazon is slashing up to 20% off NAS servers for World Backup Day — don't miss these storage deals

item.title: This is your last chance to get 26% OFF the Pixel Buds Pro 2 during Amazon's Big Spring Sale

item.title: This last-minute Galaxy S26 Ultra deal gives you $200 to spend on accessories

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 firmware leak signals launch is right around the corner

item.title: I used this hidden Google Pay feature to automate credit card bill payments
item.description: Google Pay in India has a hidden feature that lets you add all credit card billers, allowing you to pay bills with the utility. This is the CRED alternative I've been waiting for in India.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda
